chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constitutional Petition No. D- 1353 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For orders on CMA 619/2023 (ex) 3. For main case. 16.04.2025. Mr. Zulifqar Ali Naich, AAG. ******************* Syed Fateh Muhammad Shah Advocate while holding brief for Mr. Qurban Ali Malano counsel for applicant submits that he has been instructed by Mr. Malano not to press this petition, the same is dismissed as not pressed along with listed application. JUDGE JUDGE Irfan/PA
